chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.496 of 2024 Commissioner Inland Revenue and others Versus Zaakia Talib DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For order on office objection a/w reply as at “A”. 2. For order on CMA No.3035/2024 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 02.12.2024 Mr. Syed Irshad-ur-Rehman, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The impugned order provides a clear statement of facts that the officials defending the suit were present and categorically submitted before the learned Single Judge that the notices impugned in the suit stand withdrawn. That has ended the controversy between the plaintiffs and defendants of the suit, hence the arguments of the learned counsel that the reported judgment was not appreciated properly is of no consequence when the officials, who were present along with counsel, stated that they are withdrawing the notices with the liberty to issue fresh notices in accordance with law (if required). No interference is required. The appeal is dismissed along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
